case_title: ANA CECILIA SULLIVAN VS. SERVICEMASTER OF SAN FRANCISCO/SAN MATEO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SULLIVAN, ANA CECILIA AS TO DEFENDANT SERVICEMASTER OF SAN FRANCISCO/SAN MATEO PASINOKSY, JENNIFER LUBBAT, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-18-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2023

Off Calendar May-13-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SCOTT DUNNING, Esq. of Dunning Law Group, APC (tel: 415-956-1888) for Plaintiff.
Atty. GREGORY MERCER, Esq. of Collins + Collins LLP (tel: 626-243-1100) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SERVICEMASTER OF SAN FRANCISCO/SAN MATEO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

The Court holds a discussion as to the late contest e-mail. The Court allows oral argument. Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order overruling Defendant ServiceMaster of San Francisco/ San Mateo's demurrer (see signed order for complete ruling). (302/RBU)*****
